title: Open Directory Listing on Subdomain — /.well-known/
description: Directory listing is enabled at https://fb.lodhagroup.com/.well-known/. Files in this path are publicly browsable. Sample files: pki-validation/.
action: Disable directory listing in your web server config. Audit the exposed path for credentials, backups, or config files.

title: Port 80 Open — HTTP
description: Port 80/tcp (http) is open on fb.lodhagroup.com. HTTP — unencrypted web traffic. Verify this is intentionally public.
action: Confirm port 80 is intentionally internet-facing. Ensure the service is up to date and properly configured.

title: Restricted Endpoint Detected (Access Blocked)
description: The subdomain 'servicedesk.lodhagroup.com' returned HTTP 403/401, meaning the service exists on the public internet but access is currently blocked. It is still part of your attack surface.
action: Verify that access controls are correctly configured and will not degrade over time. Consider restricting it to internal networks if it does not need to be public.
